tasks.subject: Build site data script
tasks.description: scripts/build_site_data.py: read all enriched + github JSON, produce docs/data/packages.json (compact, ~500KB) with fields: name, description, type, publisher, downloads_last_week, download_trend, gh_stars, gh_forks, gh_is_fork, gh_pushed_at, keywords, similar[] (top-5 TF-IDF). Also write docs/data/pidex-full.json.gz for dataset download.

tasks.subject: Export notebook to HTML report
tasks.description: Export notebooks/explore.ipynb to docs/report.html using nbconvert. Make sure all plots render inline (they're Agg/saved files, need to embed them). The notebook output IS the report.

tasks.subject: Build static site frontend
tasks.description: docs/index.html: vanilla JS, no build step. Two-tab layout: Browse (filterable package table) and Report (iframe or link to report.html). Browse tab: search input, type filter, sort by downloads/stars/trending, package rows with sparkline, stars, type badge. Simple, readable, fast.

tasks.subject: Enable GitHub Pages and deploy
tasks.description: Enable GitHub Pages on the pidex repo (docs/ folder), push, verify it's live.
